name: codex-memory
description: Local Codex runtime skill generator, workflow guard, and reviewed memory ledger.

interface.shortDescription: Runtime skills, workflow guard, and reviewed memory ledger for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Memory turns clean long-term memory and trusted seed skills into task-specific Runtime Skills, observes Codex work through hooks, guards engineering workflows against missing inspection or verification, evaluates durable memory candidates with GPT-5.4-Mini, and stores reviewed memories in a local SQLite Ledger.
